text: تَنْزِيلُ‌ الْکِتَابِ‌ مِنَ‌ اللَّهِ‌ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ‌

en.ahmedali: The revelation of this Book is from God the all-mighty and all-knowing,
en.ahmedraza: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Most Honourable, the All Knowing.
en.arberry: The sending down of the Book is from God the All-mighty, the All-knowing,
en.daryabadi: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Mighty, the Knower. Forgiver of sin, and Accepter of repentance, severe in chastisement, Lord of power. There is no god but He; Unto Him is the journeying.
en.hilali: The revelation of the Book (this Quran) is from Allah the All-Mighty, the All-Knower.
en.itani: The sending down of the Scripture is from God the Almighty, the Omniscient.
en.maududi: This Book is a revelation from Allah, the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing;
en.mubarakpuri: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Almighty, the All-Knower.
en.pickthall: The revelation of the Scripture is from Allah, the Mighty, the Knower,
en.qarai: The [gradual] sending down of the Book is from Allah, the All-mighty, the All-knowing,
en.qaribullah: The sending down of the Book is from Allah, the Almighty, the Knower.
en.sahih: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
en.sarwar: This Book is a revelation from God, the Majestic and All-knowing
en.shakir: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Mighty, the Knowing,
en.transliteration: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alAAaleemi
en.wahiduddin: This Book is revealed by God, the Almighty, the All Knowing.
en.yusufali: The revelation of this Book is from Allah, Exalted in Power, Full of Knowledge,-
fa.ansarian: این کتاب نازل شده از سوی خدای توانای شکست ناپذیر وداناست؛
fa.ayati: نزول اين كتاب از جانب خداى پيروزمند داناست؛
fa.bahrampour: فرو فرستادن [اين‌] كتاب از جانب خداى شكست ناپذير داناست
fa.fooladvand: فرو فرستادن اين كتاب، از جانب خداى ارجمند داناست،
fa.ghomshei: نزول این کتاب آسمانی (قرآن) از جانب خدای مقتدر داناست.
fa.khorramdel: فرو فرستادن این کتاب (قرآن) از سوی یزدان چیره و آگاه انجام می‌پذیرد. [[«تَنزِیلُ الْکِتَابِ ...»: (نگا: زمر / 1).]]
fa.khorramshahi: کتابی است فرو فرستاده از سوی خداوند پیروزمند دانا
fa.makarem: این کتابی است که از سوی خداوند قادر و دانا نازل شده است.
fa.moezzi: فرستادن کتاب از خداوند عزّتمند دانا
fa.mojtabavi: فرو فرستادن اين كتاب از سوى خداى توانمند بى‌همتا و داناست
fa.sadeqi: فرو فرستادن تدریجی این کتاب، از جانب خدای عزیز بسیار داناست،
